name: adk
description: ADR-driven kit v2 (ADR-first) — docs/decisions/ is the single source of truth; PRD/BUSINESS-FLOW/ARCHITECTURE/UX-DESIGN/REQUIREMENTS/PRINCIPLES are re-renderable derived views. Bootstrap (once): adk:kickoff adk:product adk:architecture adk:requirements. Lifecycle (anytime, forever): adk:adr adk:docs-check adk:pivot adk:router adk:agent-rules. Elicitation: adk:interview adk:brainstorm adk:grill adk:grill-docs. Shared references under references/.
